[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00001000 1
5 00010001 2
6 10101010 4
7 00011000 2

01 11110100 5
12 01010101 4
23 10011101 5
34 01011001 4
45 10001001 3
56 00001001 2
67 11101010 5
70 00001111 4

02 01011110 5
13 00110111 5
24 00111011 5
35 00101111 5
46 01111111 7
57 00011100 3
60 00011010 3
71 00000100 1

03 00111100 4
14 10010001 3
25 01001101 4
36 11011001 5
47 01101010 4
50 11101100 5
61 00010001 2 match 5
72 10101110 5

04 10011010 4

73 11001100 4

05 11101100 5
16 00010001 2 match 5
27 10101110 5

06 00011010 3
